mapper.sql: id, title, summary, content, content_html, cover_image, user_id, category_id, article_status, review_status, publish_time, read_count, like_count, comment_count, collection_count, share_count, top, recommended, visible, allow_comment, allow_forward, original, original_url, last_edit_time, article_version, create_time, update_time, deleted, deleted_time, scheduled_publish_time, share_token, meta_title, meta_description, meta_keywords
mapper.select:
select
from article where id = #{id} and deleted = 0

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.content, a.content_html, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.article_status, a.visible, a.allow_comment, a.allow_forward, a.original, a.original_url, a.publish_time, a.last_edit_time, a.read_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.collection_count, a.share_count, a.user_id, u.avatar, u.nickname, u.gender, u.signature, u.article_count, u.follow_count, u.follower_count, a.category_id, c.name as category_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.deleted = 0 and a.article_status = 3
AND a.category_id = #{query.categoryId}
AND a.id IN ( SELECT article_id FROM article_tag WHERE tag_id = #{query.tagId} )
AND (a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR a.summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%'))

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.article_status, a.visible, a.publish_time, a.last_edit_time, a.read_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.user_id, a.category_id, u.avatar, u.nickname, c.name as category_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.article_status = 3 ORDER BY a.read_count DESC, a.like_count DESC, a.comment_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.article_status, a.visible, a.publish_time, a.last_edit_time, a.read_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.user_id, a.category_id, u.avatar, u.nickname, c.name as category_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.article_status = 3 ORDER BY a.publish_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.article_status, a.visible, a.publish_time, a.last_edit_time, a.read_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.user_id, a.category_id, u.nickname, u.avatar, c.name as category_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.article_status = 3 AND a.cover_image IS NOT NULL AND a.cover_image != '' ORDER BY a.top DESC, a.recommended DESC, a.read_count DESC, a.publish_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.article_status, a.visible, a.publish_time, a.last_edit_time, a.read_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.user_id, a.category_id, u.avatar, u.nickname, c.name as category_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.user_id = #{userId} AND a.article_status = 3 ORDER BY a.top DESC, a.publish_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) FROM article a WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.user_id = #{userId} AND a.article_status = 3

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.article_status, a.visible, a.publish_time, a.last_edit_time, a.read_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.user_id, a.category_id, u.avatar, u.nickname, c.name as category_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.user_id = #{userId} AND a.id != #{excludeArticleId} AND a.article_status = 3 ORDER BY a.top DESC, a.publish_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.article_status, a.visible, a.publish_time, a.last_edit_time, a.read_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.user_id, a.category_id, u.avatar, u.nickname, c.name as category_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.article_status = 3 AND (a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY CASE WHEN a.title LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%') THEN 0 WHEN a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') THEN 1 WHEN a.summary LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%') THEN 2 WHEN a.summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, a.read_count DESC, a.publish_time DESC
ORDER BY a.publish_time DESC
ORDER BY a.read_count DESC, a.publish_time DESC
ORDER BY a.read_count DESC, a.publish_time DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) FROM article a WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.article_status = 3 AND (a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) FROM article a WHERE a.deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM article WHERE id IN
#{id}
AND deleted = 0

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.article_status, a.visible, a.publish_time, a.last_edit_time, a.read_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.user_id, a.category_id, u.avatar, u.nickname, c.name as category_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.category_id = #{categoryId} AND a.article_status = 3 ORDER BY a.top DESC, a.publish_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.article_status, a.visible, a.publish_time, a.last_edit_time, a.read_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.user_id, a.category_id, u.avatar, u.nickname, c.name as category_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN article_tag at ON a.id = at.article_id WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND at.tag_id = #{tagId} AND a.article_status = 3 GROUP BY a.id ORDER BY a.top DESC, a.publish_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article (title, summary, content, content_html, cover_image, user_id, category_id, article_status, review_status, publish_time, read_count, like_count, comment_count, collection_count, share_count, top, recommended, visible, allow_comment, allow_forward, original, original_url, last_edit_time, create_time, update_time, deleted, deleted_time, scheduled_publish_time, share_token, meta_title, meta_description, meta_keywords) VALUES (#{title}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{contentHtml}, #{coverImage}, #{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{articleStatus}, #{reviewStatus}, #{publishTime}, #{readCount}, #{likeCount}, #{commentCount}, #{collectionCount}, #{shareCount}, #{top}, #{recommended}, #{visible}, #{allowComment}, #{allowForward}, #{original}, #{originalUrl}, #{lastEditTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted}, #{deletedTime}, #{scheduledPublishTime}, #{shareToken}, #{metaTitle}, #{metaDescription}, #{metaKeywords})
mapper.update: UPDATE article SET read_count = read_count + #{increment} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE article SET like_count = like_count + #{offset} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE article SET comment_count = comment_count + #{offset} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE article SET collection_count = collection_count + #{offset} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE article SET share_count = share_count + #{offset} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE article SET top = #{topStatus} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE article SET recommended = #{recommendStatus} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
update article set article_status = 5 where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId}
update article set article_status = 5 where id = #{id}
update article set deleted = 1 where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT read_count FROM article WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT like_count FROM article WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT comment_count FROM article WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT collection_count FROM article WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT share_count FROM article WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT article_version FROM article WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM article WHERE article_status = 2 AND scheduled_publish_time IS NOT NULL AND scheduled_publish_time <= #{currentTime} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM article WHERE share_token = #{shareToken} AND deleted = 0

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.summary, a.content, a.content_html, a.cover_image, a.article_status, a.review_status, a.create_time, a.publish_time, a.last_edit_time, a.read_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.collection_count, a.share_count, a.top, a.recommended, a.visible, a.allow_comment, a.allow_forward, a.original, a.original_url, a.meta_title, a.meta_description, a.meta_keywords, a.user_id, u.nickname, a.category_id, c.name as category_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.deleted = 0
